zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Bassett於1470年出生在英國斯塔福爾布洛爾時，她的父親William Bassett34歲，母親Joan Byron41歲。她於1499年與Sir William I De Beaumont 2nd Viscount, KN在英國萊希斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1539年7月2日在英國斯塔福爾黑阿德爾享年69歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Bassett于1470年出生在英国斯塔福爾布洛爾时，她的父亲William Bassett34岁，母亲Joan Byron41岁。她于1499年与Sir William I De Beaumont 2nd Viscount, KN在英国萊希斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1539年7月2日在英国斯塔福爾黑阿德爾享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bassett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from Old French basset ‘of low stature’, a diminutive of basse ‘low, short’, either a nickname for a short person or a status name for someone of humble origins.
Altered form of French Bessette 1 or Besset (see Bessette 2).

History: William Bassett (c. 1598–1667) came to Plymouth, MA, from Kent, England, in the 1620s; c. 1650 he moved to Duxbury and subesequently to Bridgewater. He had many prominent descendants, among them one of the earliest families on Martha's Vineyard. — The surname Bassett of French origin (see 2 above) is listed in the register of Huguenot ancestors recognized by the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Bessette
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Marcel, Armand, Adrien, Normand, Alphonse, Lucien, Cecile, Herve, Jacques, Laurent, Aime.

French: topographic name designating a small wood of birches, from Occitan bès ‘birch tree’ (see Besse ), or a habitational name from (La) Bessette, the name of several places in the southern part of France.
Alternatively, an altered form of French Besset: topographic name, a cognate of 1 above. Altered ending reflects the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Bassett was born in 1470, in Blore, Staffordshire, England, her father, William Bassett, was 34 and her mother, Joan Byron, was 41. She married Sir William I De Beaumont 2nd Viscount, KN in 1499, in Leicestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 2 July 1539, in Cheadle, Staffordshire, England, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Bassett est née en 1470, à Blore, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, William Bassett, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Joan Byron, avait 41 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William I De Beaumont 2nd Viscount, KN en 1499, à Leicestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 2 juillet 1539, à Cheadle, Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Bassett 1470 in Blore, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Bassett 34 und ihre Mutter Joan Byron 41. Sie hat 1499 in Leicestershire, England Sir William I De Beaumont 2nd Viscount, KN geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 2. Juli 1539 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Cheadle, Staffordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Bassett è nata il nel 1470 nel Blore, Staffordshire, England, sua padre, William Bassett, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Joan Byron, aveva 41 anni. Lei sposato Sir William I De Beaumont 2nd Viscount, KN nel 1499, nel Leicestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 2 luglio 1539, nel Cheadle, Staffordshire, England, all'età di 69 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Bassettが1470年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアブロアで生まれた時，父William Bassettは34歳，母Joan Byronは41歳であった。1499年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアでSir William I De Beaumont 2nd Viscount, KNと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1539年7月2日にイギリススタフォードシュアイアチェアドルで69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Bassett(이)가 1470년 영국 스태퍼드실르 블로어에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Bassett(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Byron(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 1499년 영국 레이스스터실르에서 Sir William I De Beaumont 2nd Viscount, KN(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1539년 7월 2일 영국 스태퍼드실르 체아들일에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Bassett nasceu em 1470, em Blore, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Bassett, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Joan Byron, tinha 41 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William I De Beaumont 2nd Viscount, KN em 1499, em Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 2 de julho de 1539, em Cheadle, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, com 69 anos.

ru.Orton on the Hill, Leicestershire, Engla: ортон он т хилл, лисестиршир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Bassett родилась в 1470 г. в местности блор, стаффордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени William Bassett было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Byron, 41. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William I De Beaumont 2nd Viscount, KN в 1499 г. в местности лисестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 2 июля 1539 г. в местности чидл, стаффордшир, Англия в возрасте 69 лет.
